message:
fix: repair 3 pre-existing doctor test failures

- artifacts_test: expect 2 JSONL artifacts (issues.jsonl was removed from
  scan list as it is git-tracked, not an artifact)
- dolt_test: fix case-sensitive assertion -- Fix string uses lowercase lock
- perf_dolt_test: force embedded mode via BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_MODE=0 so a
  running Dolt server on port 3307 does not pollute test results
- isDoltServerRunning: respect BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_MODE=0 to skip TCP probe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
